languages.original_text: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

languages.text: "Вероятность обнаружения индивида со схожими психофизиологическими характеристиками близка к нулевой, нет — отрицательной. Иными словами, проще будет создать генетический дубликат утерянного саванта, нежели искать нового. Но вряд ли вы, почтенный дознаватель, санкционируете такой опыт".

"The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."
languages.original_text: "Вероятность обнаружения индивида со схожими психофизиологическими характеристиками близка к нулевой, нет — отрицательной. Иными словами, проще будет создать генетический дубликат утерянного саванта, нежели искать нового. Но вряд ли вы, почтенный дознаватель, санкционируете такой опыт".

traits.locale_text: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

"The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

"The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

languages.text: «La probabilidad de encontrar a un individuo con características psicofisiológicas similares es cercana a cero... no, inferior a cero. En otras palabras, sería más sencillo crear un duplicado genético del sabio perdido que buscar uno nuevo. Pero es poco probable que usted, estimado interrogador, apruebe tal experimento».
languages.original_text: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

traits.locale_text: «La probabilidad de encontrar a un individuo con características psicofisiológicas similares es cercana a cero... no, inferior a cero. En otras palabras, sería más sencillo crear un duplicado genético del sabio perdido que buscar uno nuevo. Pero es poco probable que usted, estimado interrogador, apruebe tal experimento».

languages.text: 「同様の精神生理学的特性を持つ個体を見つけ出す確率は、ゼロに近い――いや、ゼロ未満です。言い換えれば、失われた賢者の遺伝的複製を作り出すほうが、新たな一人を探し求めるよりも容易でしょう。とはいえ、尊敬するインテロゲイター、あなたがそのような実験を認可されるとは、まず考えられませんが」
languages.original_text: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

traits.locale_text: 「同様の精神生理学的特性を持つ個体を見つけ出す確率は、ゼロに近い――いや、ゼロ未満です。言い換えれば、失われた賢者の遺伝的複製を作り出すほうが、新たな一人を探し求めるよりも容易でしょう。とはいえ、尊敬するインテロゲイター、あなたがそのような実験を認可されるとは、まず考えられませんが」

languages.text: “找到有类似心理生理特征个体的概率趋近于零——不，是低于零。换句话说，制造一个已逝贤者的基因副本，比找一个新的要容易。当然，我不认为你会批准这样的实验，尊敬的审讯官。”
languages.original_text: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

traits.locale_text: “找到有类似心理生理特征个体的概率趋近于零——不，是低于零。换句话说，制造一个已逝贤者的基因副本，比找一个新的要容易。当然，我不认为你会批准这样的实验，尊敬的审讯官。”

languages.text: "Die Wahrscheinlichkeit, ein Individuum mit ähnlichen psychophysiologischen Eigenschaften zu finden, geht gegen null ... nein, sie liegt darunter. Mit anderen Worten ... es wäre einfacher, ein genetisches Duplikat der verlorenen Weisen zu erschaffen, als einen neuen zu suchen. Allerdings ist nicht damit zu rechnen, dass Ihr, geschätzter Interrogator, ein derartiges Experiment sanktioniert."
languages.original_text: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

traits.locale_text: "Die Wahrscheinlichkeit, ein Individuum mit ähnlichen psychophysiologischen Eigenschaften zu finden, geht gegen null ... nein, sie liegt darunter. Mit anderen Worten ... es wäre einfacher, ein genetisches Duplikat der verlorenen Weisen zu erschaffen, als einen neuen zu suchen. Allerdings ist nicht damit zu rechnen, dass Ihr, geschätzter Interrogator, ein derartiges Experiment sanktioniert."

languages.text: « La probabilité de trouver un individu présentant les mêmes caractéristiques psychophysiologiques est proche de zéro. Non, inférieure à zéro. En d'autres termes, il serait plus aisé de créer une copie génétique du Sage perdu que d'en chercher un nouveau. Mais je serais étonné que vous, honorable interrogateur, approuviez une telle expérience. »
languages.original_text: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

traits.locale_text: « La probabilité de trouver un individu présentant les mêmes caractéristiques psychophysiologiques est proche de zéro. Non, inférieure à zéro. En d'autres termes, il serait plus aisé de créer une copie génétique du Sage perdu que d'en chercher un nouveau. Mais je serais étonné que vous, honorable interrogateur, approuviez une telle expérience. »

languages.text: "Benzer ruhfizyolojik özelliklere sahip bir birey bulma olasılığı sıfıra yakın. Hayır, sıfırdan da az. Başka bir deyişle... Kayıp Âlim'in genetik bir kopyasını oluşturmak, yenisini aramaktan daha kolay olacaktır. Ancak sizin böyle bir deneye onay vermeniz pek olası değil saygıdeğer Sorgucu."
languages.original_text: "The probability of finding an individual with similar psychophysiological characteristics is close to zero — no, less than zero. In other words, it would be easier to create a genetic duplicate of the lost Sage than to seek out a new one. But it is unlikely that you, esteemed Interrogator, would sanction such an experiment."

Kayıp Âlim'in genetik bir kopyasını oluşturmak, yenisini aramaktan daha kolay olacaktır. Ancak sizin böyle bir deneye onay vermeniz pek olası değil saygıdeğer Sorgucu."
